reasoning_steps: Step 1: Compare invoice vs ledger — invoice total 12,500,000 VND vs GL posting 12,500,000 VND (matched on amount).
Step 2: Detect mismatch — VAT input on invoice 1,250,000 VND vs VAT declared in return line 900,000 VND (variance 350,000 VND).
Step 3: Cross-check thresholds — exceeds immateriality threshold configured for this entity (example).

legal_citation.text: Based on Article 3, Clause 2, Circular No. 123/2012/TT-BTC (demo excerpt), taxable price is defined without VAT; VAT deduction requires valid invoices per Article 9 (demo excerpt).

human_approval.note: AI never makes final compliance decisions; reviewer must confirm.
